grading_results.text: Explains why OOM occurs (model too large for VRAM)
grading_results.evidence: Explains '70B parameter model requires significantly more memory' with table showing FP16 ~140GB vs 12GB VRAM
Includes 'Solution 3: Aggressive Quantization' with IQ2_XXS and specific llama.cpp commands

grading_results.text: Suggests smaller model or reduced context
grading_results.evidence: Provides 'Solution 2: Use a Smaller Model' with table of suitable models for 12GB VRAM
